— today

12 June 2026, A check on the Naira to Dollar Black market (Abokifx) exchange rate we are pleased to report that it is ₦1,400 (sell) in most location around Lagos,Kano, Abuja and Portharcourt. this simple means that you should expect to buy a dollar at ₦1,400 and if you want to sell then it should be ₦1,388 rate.

Dollars to Naira Black Market

Here is Today’s 12 June 2026 Dollar to Naira black market rate: it is simply the rate street sellers or Aboki/Bureau De Change (BDC) will sell to you right on demand and on the other hand buying the United States Dollar currently in Abuja, Kano, Lagos.

Dollars to Naira (USD to NGN)
Type Exchange Rate Today
Buying Rate₦1,388
Selling Rate₦1,400
[ad_inline1]

Euro to Naira Black Market

Here is Today’s being 12 June 2026 Euro to Naira black market rate: it is simply the rate street sellers or Aboki/Bureau De Change (BDC) are selling and buying the Euro currently in popular places in major cities across Nigeria his include Abuja, Kano, Lagos.

Euro to Naira (EUR to NGN)
Type Exchange Rate Today
Buying Rate₦1,590
Selling Rate₦1,620

Pounds to Naira Black Market

Here is Today’s being 12 June 2026 Pounds to Naira black market rate: this is simply the rate that you are going to source or get it from Aboki/Bureau De Change (BDC) and the rate they are selling and buying the British Pounds in popular area in and around Abuja, Kano, Lagos.

Pounds to Naira (GBP to NGN)
Type Exchange Rate Today
Buying Rate₦1,840
Selling Rate₦1,880

CAD to Naira Black Market

Here is Today’s 12 June 2026 Canadian Dollar to Naira black market rate: please note that this is simply the rate Aboki/Bureau De Change (BDC) and those that sells at parallel market rate are selling and buying the Canadian Dollar currently in and around popular places in Abuja, Kano, Lagos.

Canadian Dollar to Naira (CAD to NGN)
Type Exchange Rate Today
Buying Rate₦999
Selling Rate₦1,007
